eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 10:31 PM on JUL 2, 2026 Effective until 9:31 PM JUL 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: Colorado City north of highway 165 east of Table Mountain Church, and west of Crow Cutoff is under mandatory evacuation. Please evacuate quickly, fire is unpredictable with winds. If you need assistance evacuating please call 911. evac
